inputs.label: Selling Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: The price at which the product is sold to customers

inputs.label: Cost Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: The price paid to the supplier per unit

inputs.label: Shipping Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: The shipping cost incurred per unit delivered

inputs.label: Monthly Order Volume
inputs.businessContext: Number of orders processed per month

inputs.label: Monthly Fixed Costs
inputs.businessContext: Fixed operational costs per month (e.g., store subscriptions, marketing)

inputs.label: Payment Gateway Fee
inputs.businessContext: Transaction fee as a percentage of the selling price
